title: Chewllagen Chicken Retriever Roll with Collagen 10 inch (Pack of x 3) Healthy Choice Dog Chew and Treat
features: Collagen is the most abundant protein in the body and has many important functions, including the growth and repair of bones, tendons, ligaments, skin, and fur. As animals age, they produce less and lower-quality collagen.

HIGHLY RECOMMENDED – At Maltbys Stores, we're a family of dog lovers (which is why we all have dogs ourselves!) so we know when it comes to finding treats for your own furry friends, you're looking for something that's not only great tasting but also helps to promote your pet's health and wellbeing. Choosing natural treats is a great choice for your dog as they are generally lower in fat and higher in protein than most processed dog treats, and what’s more, dogs love them too!

100% NATURAL – All of our dog treats are kept in their entirely natural form, with absolutely no added colours, flavours or preservatives that might not be so good for your dog's digestion. They are all air-dried from raw to retain their vital nutrients and, most importantly for your dog, their delicious smells and flavours too!

QUALITY WE ARE PROUD OF - Maltby's have been a family run business since 1904, and during that time we have always tried to provide our customers with the best quality products for their pets at the fairest prices. So whether you're little loved ones happen to have fur, feathers, or even scales, we're bound to have something for you! Visit our Ebay store to browse our full range of products, or feel free to contact us if you have any questions we can answer

PLEASE NOTE: This product has been packaged and stored in a facility where it may have come into contact with common allergens, including peanuts, milk, egg, wheat and fish products. This is a supplementary animal food product, intended to be used as part of a balanced diet. Maltbys Stores 1904 Ltd do not sell any products that are intended for human consumption.
description: Product Description A family run business for over 115 years A heritage we are proud of Beginning as a specialist retailer of bird seeds, we have expanded our product range over the years and now offer a comprehensive selection of animal feeds, wild bird foods, dog treats, garden supplies and fishing products. Our Story Maltbys' Stores is a pet and garden supplies retailer based in Hull, UK. Since opening in 1904, we have always aimed to provide our customers with the best quality products we can find. Now in our sixth family generation, we are still continuing to look for new ways to provide fantastic products to you and your pets. We know your animal's needs are very important, which is why we continue to work with our suppliers to find the freshest and best quality products available. Specialists in wild bird foods and feeders Huge range of natural dog treats and chews Fishing pellets, baits, ingredients and liquids Garden supplies, including grass seeds Huge selection of foods for aviary birds, poultry, pigeons, pond fish and more Collagen is a hugely important protein in the body, and has many functions. Our range of Chewllagen dog treats can support your dog's health in a number of ways, including: Bone growth and repair Strengthening ligaments and tendons Promoting healthy skin and fur Reducing joint pain Improved digestive health Chewllagen Dog Treats Chewllagen dog treats are a range of dog treats made from collagen. The collagen proteins, derived from South American grass-fed cattle hide, are broken dog through a heating process to create smaller and more easily digestible molecules. The collagen is then shaped and baked to create its distinctive 'bread-like' texture, before the treats are flavoured with real meat. Chewllagen treats are available in both Chicken and Beef flavours, in the following varieties: Chips Donuts Medium Rolls Mini Rolls 5" Retriever Rolls 10" Retriever Rolls Customer Reviews Price Ingredients Collagen (65%), Chicken (18%), Corn Starch, Vegetable Glycerine, Collagen Fibre Collagen (65%), Chicken (18%), Corn Starch, Vegetable Glycerine, Collagen Fibre Collagen (65%), Chicken (18%), Corn Starch, Vegetable Glycerine, Collagen Fibre Collagen (65%), Chicken (18%), Corn Starch, Vegetable Glycerine, Collagen Fibre Collagen (65%), Chicken (18%), Corn Starch, Vegetable Glycerine, Collagen Fibre Collagen (65%), Chicken (18%), Corn Starch, Vegetable Glycerine, Collagen Fibre Available Sizes x3, x5, x10 x1, x3, x5 x2, x6, x10 x5, x15, x25 x1, x3, x5 x1, x3 A complementary pet food product for dogs. To be used as part of a balanced diet. Directions for use: always monitor your dog when feeding them treats, and ensure there is a supply of fresh water available. If you have any queries or concerns we would always recommend consulting your vet before making changes to your dog's diet.
